name: workflow profile registration rejects an unknown workflow stage name
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/register-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --workflow-stage no-such-stage 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_workflow_stage' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
